description_long: This is a modern pair of smart glasses featuring a rectangular full-rim frame with a sleek, minimalist design. The lenses display digital interfaces, including app icons and a digital clock, suggesting augmented reality or heads-up display functionality. The frame is relatively thin, with straight temples that curve gently at the ends for a secure fit behind the ears. The bridge is a simple, straight bar connecting the two lenses, with no visible nose pads or additional support structures. The temples are two-toned, with the front portion matching the frame and the rear portion in a contrasting darker color. No visible brand logo or decorative embellishments are present, emphasizing a clean and functional aesthetic.
description: A sleek, rectangular pair of smart glasses with digital displays on the lenses and a minimalist, two-tone full-rim frame.
description_view_0: Front view showing both lenses with digital displays, app icons, and a clock interface, highlighting the rectangular frame and straight bridge.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the frame and the two-tone design of the temples, with a gentle curve at the end.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the inner side of the lenses with mirrored digital interfaces and the full length of the temples.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other temple's two-tone design and the frame's slim construction.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular full-rim frame with thin, straight temples that curve at the ends; minimalist and modern with no decorative embellishments.
attribute_lens_tint: Clear, fully transparent lenses with digital overlays displaying icons and information; no visible tint or coloration.
attribute_bridge_style: Simple, straight bridge connecting the lenses without nose pads or additional support; standard bar design.
attribute_temple_detailing: Temples are thin and straight with a two-tone color scheme, transitioning from the frame color to a darker shade at the ends; no visible patterns or engravings.
